source: hand-written hp-15z safety-supersession action-arbitration tending fixture
notes: A recovery ActionPlan is already accepted and in flight for GreenBear when watch-safety-thresholds emits a safety ActionPlan for the same swarm. Per plan.md §8.8 and hp-15z, the safety swarm.halt plan wins, the recovery plan is recorded as superseded_by the safety plan, and the record links to the winning safety run.
